message:
🐛 Fix single cluster refresh to not reload all clusters

Change the refresh button on unreachable clusters to only refresh
the specific cluster that was clicked, instead of refreshing all
clusters in the list.

Changes:
- Add refreshSingleCluster() export to useMCP.ts
- Update ClusterGrid to accept onRefreshCluster(clusterName) callback
- Update Clusters.tsx to use refreshSingleCluster

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
